hypothesis: Pretraining EfficientNet-B0 on a data-rich, additive-free SEM image dataset of NCM cathodes followed by fine-tuning on a smaller additive-induced SEM image dataset will yield higher class-wise accuracy and F1 scores across the nine NCM composition–aging-state classes than models trained without this two-stage transfer learning, demonstrating transferable morphological features from data-rich to data-poor domains.
